series_metadata.series_description: This series contains records generally associated with citations issued by Division of Parks and Watercraft officers, including, but not limited to: citations and summons. These documents are used as court documents and audit tools.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: criminal or administrative proceedings are closed and Agency/Department-wide audit are conducted by State Auditor, unless they are scanned and saved in electronic format. these documents are scanned and saved in an electronic format, paper copy may be shredded. ; Electronic: criminal or administrative proceedings are closed and Agency/Department-wide audit are conducted by State Auditor
